lesson.menu_title: On the Phone / On a Call -- Answering and Making Work Calls
lesson.menu_desc: Reading + phone phrases and question forms for calls -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- On the Phone / On a Call -- Answering and Making Work Calls
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 8 -- On the Phone

paras: It is Monday morning. Maísa is at her desk. The phone rings, and she answers the phone. "Good morning, finance team. Maísa speaking."
A man says: "Hello, can I speak to David, please?" Maísa answers: "One moment, please. Hold on." She looks for David, but he is not at his desk.
"I am sorry, David is not here right now. Would you like to leave a message?" The man says: "Yes, please. This is Mr. Costa. Could you ask David to call me back? My number is 3355."
Maísa writes the message. "Of course, Mr. Costa. I will give him the message." "Thank you very much," the man says. "You are welcome. Have a good day!" Then Maísa hangs up the phone.

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa talks to David on the phone about a new meeting.
Maísa answers a call for David, but he is not there, so she takes a message for him.
Maísa calls Mr. Costa to give him some bad news.

items: Maísa answers the phone at her desk on Monday morning.
The text says it is Monday morning, Maísa is at her desk, and she answers the phone.
David speaks to Mr. Costa on the phone.
David is not at his desk, so Maísa takes a message. David does not speak to Mr. Costa.
Mr. Costa wants David to call him back.
Mr. Costa asks: "Could you ask David to call me back?"
Maísa does not write the message.
Maísa writes the message and says she will give it to David.

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. I am calling about our project. I am sorry, I missed your call this morning. The line was busy. Could you call me back this afternoon? I am free after two o'clock. If I do not answer, please leave a message, and I will call you back. Thank you, and have a good day. Bye!

Good morning. This is Sarah from the finance team. I have a message for you. A new client called this morning, but you were not at your desk. He wants to speak to you today. Could you call him back before five o'clock? His name is Mr. Costa. If the line is busy, please try again later. Do not forget to call him back today. Thank you very much. Talk soon!

extra_audio.text: Hello, can I speak to David, please? I am sorry, he is not here right now. Would you like to leave a message? Thank you. I will ask him to call you back.
